;;;1148               u32ClkSrc = CLK_GetPCLK0Freq(); /* Clock source is PCLK0 */
000e12  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_GetPCLK0Freq
000e16  e065              B        |L1.3812|
                  |L1.3608|
;;;1149           }
;;;1150           else
;;;1151           {
;;;1152               u32ClkSrc = __HIRC; /* Clock source is HIRC */
;;;1153           }
;;;1154       }
;;;1155       else if(spi == SPI8)
000e18  4b24              LDR      r3,|L1.3756|
000e1a  4299              CMP      r1,r3
000e1c  d118              BNE      |L1.3664|
;;;1156       {
;;;1157           if((CLK->CLKSEL4 & CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI8SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI8SEL_HXT)
000e1e  f8d2125c          LDR      r1,[r2,#0x25c]
000e22  f4112fe0          TST      r1,#0x70000
000e26  d05d              BEQ      |L1.3812|
;;;1158           {
;;;1159               u32ClkSrc = __HXT; /* Clock source is HXT */
;;;1160           }
;;;1161           else if((CLK->CLKSEL4 & CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI8SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI8SEL_PLL_DIV2)
000e28  f8d2125c          LDR      r1,[r2,#0x25c]
000e2c  f3c14102          UBFX     r1,r1,#16,#3
000e30  2901              CMP      r1,#1
000e32  d006              BEQ      |L1.3650|
;;;1162           {
;;;1163               u32ClkSrc = (CLK_GetPLLClockFreq() >> 1); /* Clock source is PLL/2 */
;;;1164           }
;;;1165           else if((CLK->CLKSEL4 & CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI8SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI8SEL_PCLK1)
000e34  f8d2125c          LDR      r1,[r2,#0x25c]
000e38  f3c14102          UBFX     r1,r1,#16,#3
000e3c  2902              CMP      r1,#2
000e3e  d004              BEQ      |L1.3658|
000e40  e050              B        |L1.3812|
                  |L1.3650|
000e42  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_GetPLLClockFreq
000e46  0840              LSRS     r0,r0,#1              ;1163
000e48  e04c              B        |L1.3812|
                  |L1.3658|
;;;1166           {
;;;1167               u32ClkSrc = CLK_GetPCLK1Freq(); /* Clock source is PCLK1 */
000e4a  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_GetPCLK1Freq
000e4e  e049              B        |L1.3812|
                  |L1.3664|
;;;1168           }
;;;1169           else
;;;1170           {
;;;1171               u32ClkSrc = __HIRC; /* Clock source is HIRC */
;;;1172           }
;;;1173       }
;;;1174       else if(spi == SPI9)
000e50  4b17              LDR      r3,|L1.3760|
000e52  4299              CMP      r1,r3
000e54  d118              BNE      |L1.3720|
;;;1175       {
;;;1176           if((CLK->CLKSEL4 & CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI9SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI9SEL_HXT)
000e56  f8d2125c          LDR      r1,[r2,#0x25c]
000e5a  f4110fe0          TST      r1,#0x700000
000e5e  d041              BEQ      |L1.3812|
;;;1177           {
;;;1178               u32ClkSrc = __HXT; /* Clock source is HXT */
;;;1179           }
;;;1180           else if((CLK->CLKSEL4 & CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI9SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI9SEL_PLL_DIV2)
000e60  f8d2125c          LDR      r1,[r2,#0x25c]
000e64  f3c15102          UBFX     r1,r1,#20,#3
000e68  2901              CMP      r1,#1
000e6a  d006              BEQ      |L1.3706|
;;;1181           {
;;;1182               u32ClkSrc = (CLK_GetPLLClockFreq() >> 1); /* Clock source is PLL/2 */
;;;1183           }
;;;1184           else if((CLK->CLKSEL4 & CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI9SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI9SEL_PCLK0)
000e6c  f8d2125c          LDR      r1,[r2,#0x25c]
000e70  f3c15102          UBFX     r1,r1,#20,#3
000e74  2902              CMP      r1,#2
000e76  d004              BEQ      |L1.3714|
000e78  e034              B        |L1.3812|
                  |L1.3706|
000e7a  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_GetPLLClockFreq
000e7e  0840              LSRS     r0,r0,#1              ;1182
000e80  e030              B        |L1.3812|
                  |L1.3714|
;;;1185           {
;;;1186               u32ClkSrc = CLK_GetPCLK0Freq(); /* Clock source is PCLK0 */
000e82  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_GetPCLK0Freq
000e86  e02d              B        |L1.3812|
                  |L1.3720|
;;;1187           }
;;;1188           else
;;;1189           {
;;;1190               u32ClkSrc = __HIRC; /* Clock source is HIRC */
;;;1191           }
;;;1192       }
;;;1193       else
;;;1194       {
;;;1195           if((CLK->CLKSEL4 & CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI10SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI10SEL_HXT)
000e88  f8d2125c          LDR      r1,[r2,#0x25c]
000e8c  f0116fe0          TST      r1,#0x7000000
000e90  d028              BEQ      |L1.3812|
;;;1196           {
;;;1197               u32ClkSrc = __HXT; /* Clock source is HXT */
;;;1198           }
;;;1199           else if((CLK->CLKSEL4 & CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI10SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI10SEL_PLL_DIV2)
000e92  f8d2125c          LDR      r1,[r2,#0x25c]
000e96  f3c16102          UBFX     r1,r1,#24,#3
000e9a  2901              CMP      r1,#1
000e9c  d01c              BEQ      |L1.3800|
;;;1200           {
;;;1201               u32ClkSrc = (CLK_GetPLLClockFreq() >> 1); /* Clock source is PLL/2 */
;;;1202           }
;;;1203           else if((CLK->CLKSEL4 & CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI10SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL4_SPI10SEL_PCLK1)
000e9e  f8d2125c          LDR      r1,[r2,#0x25c]
000ea2  f3c16102          UBFX     r1,r1,#24,#3
000ea6  2902              CMP      r1,#2
000ea8  d01a              BEQ      |L1.3808|
000eaa  e01b              B        |L1.3812|
                  |L1.3756|
                          DCD      0x4006b000
                  |L1.3760|
                          DCD      0x4006c000
                  |L1.3764|
                          DCD      0x40061000
                  |L1.3768|
                          DCD      0x00b71b00
                  |L1.3772|
                          DCD      0x40062000
                  |L1.3776|
                          DCD      0x40063000
                  |L1.3780|
                          DCD      0x40064000
                  |L1.3784|
                          DCD      0x40065000
                  |L1.3788|
                          DCD      0x40066000
                  |L1.3792|
                          DCD      0x40067000
                  |L1.3796|
                          DCD      0x40068000
                  |L1.3800|
000ed8  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_GetPLLClockFreq
000edc  0840              LSRS     r0,r0,#1              ;1201
000ede  e001              B        |L1.3812|
                  |L1.3808|
;;;1204           {
;;;1205               u32ClkSrc = CLK_GetPCLK1Freq(); /* Clock source is PCLK1 */
000ee0  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_GetPCLK1Freq
                  |L1.3812|
;;;1206           }
;;;1207           else
;;;1208           {
;;;1209               u32ClkSrc = __HIRC; /* Clock source is HIRC */
;;;1210           }
;;;1211       }
;;;1212   
;;;1213       /* Return SPI bus clock rate */
;;;1214       return (u32ClkSrc / (u32Div + 1U));
000ee4  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1
000ee6  fbb0f0f4          UDIV     r0,r0,r4
;;;1215   }
000eea  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;1216   
                          ENDP

                  SPI_EnableInt PROC
;;;1236     */
;;;1237   void SPI_EnableInt(SPI_T *spi, uint32_t u32Mask)
000eec  07ca              LSLS     r2,r1,#31
;;;1238   {
000eee  d003              BEQ      |L1.3832|
;;;1239       /* Enable unit transfer interrupt flag */
;;;1240       if((u32Mask & SPI_UNIT_INT_MASK) == SPI_UNIT_INT_MASK)
;;;1241       {
;;;1242           spi->CTL |= SPI_CTL_UNITIEN_Msk;
000ef0  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]
000ef2  f4423200          ORR      r2,r2,#0x20000
000ef6  6002              STR      r2,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.3832|
;;;1243       }
;;;1244   
;;;1245       /* Enable slave selection signal active interrupt flag */
;;;1246       if((u32Mask & SPI_SSACT_INT_MASK) == SPI_SSACT_INT_MASK)
000ef8  078a              LSLS     r2,r1,#30
000efa  d503              BPL      |L1.3844|
;;;1247       {
;;;1248           spi->SSCTL |= SPI_SSCTL_SSACTIEN_Msk;
000efc  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]
000efe  f4425280          ORR      r2,r2,#0x1000
000f02  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]
                  |L1.3844|
;;;1249       }
;;;1250   
;;;1251       /* Enable slave selection signal inactive interrupt flag */
;;;1252       if((u32Mask & SPI_SSINACT_INT_MASK) == SPI_SSINACT_INT_MASK)
000f04  074a              LSLS     r2,r1,#29
000f06  d503              BPL      |L1.3856|
;;;1253       {
;;;1254           spi->SSCTL |= SPI_SSCTL_SSINAIEN_Msk;
000f08  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]
000f0a  f4425200          ORR      r2,r2,#0x2000
000f0e  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]
                  |L1.3856|
;;;1255       }
;;;1256   
;;;1257       /* Enable slave TX under run interrupt flag */
;;;1258       if((u32Mask & SPI_SLVUR_INT_MASK) == SPI_SLVUR_INT_MASK)
000f10  070a              LSLS     r2,r1,#28
000f12  d503              BPL      |L1.3868|
;;;1259       {
;;;1260           spi->SSCTL |= SPI_SSCTL_SLVURIEN_Msk;
000f14  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]
000f16  f4427200          ORR      r2,r2,#0x200
000f1a  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]
                  |L1.3868|
;;;1261       }
;;;1262   
;;;1263       /* Enable slave bit count error interrupt flag */
;;;1264       if((u32Mask & SPI_SLVBE_INT_MASK) == SPI_SLVBE_INT_MASK)
000f1c  06ca              LSLS     r2,r1,#27
000f1e  d503              BPL      |L1.3880|
;;;1265       {
;;;1266           spi->SSCTL |= SPI_SSCTL_SLVBEIEN_Msk;
000f20  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]
000f22  f4427280          ORR      r2,r2,#0x100
000f26  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]
                  |L1.3880|
;;;1267       }
;;;1268   
;;;1269       /* Enable slave TX underflow interrupt flag */
;;;1270       if((u32Mask & SPI_TXUF_INT_MASK) == SPI_TXUF_INT_MASK)
000f28  064a              LSLS     r2,r1,#25
000f2a  d503              BPL      |L1.3892|
;;;1271       {
;;;1272           spi->FIFOCTL |= SPI_FIFOCTL_TXUFIEN_Msk;
000f2c  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
000f2e  f0420280          ORR      r2,r2,#0x80
000f32  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.3892|
;;;1273       }
;;;1274   
;;;1275       /* Enable TX threshold interrupt flag */
;;;1276       if((u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_TXTH_INT_MASK) == SPI_FIFO_TXTH_INT_MASK)
000f34  060a              LSLS     r2,r1,#24
000f36  d503              BPL      |L1.3904|
;;;1277       {
;;;1278           spi->FIFOCTL |= SPI_FIFOCTL_TXTHIEN_Msk;
000f38  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
000f3a  f0420208          ORR      r2,r2,#8
000f3e  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.3904|
;;;1279       }
;;;1280   
;;;1281       /* Enable RX threshold interrupt flag */
;;;1282       if((u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_RXTH_INT_MASK) == SPI_FIFO_RXTH_INT_MASK)
000f40  05ca              LSLS     r2,r1,#23
000f42  d503              BPL      |L1.3916|
;;;1283       {
;;;1284           spi->FIFOCTL |= SPI_FIFOCTL_RXTHIEN_Msk;
000f44  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
000f46  f0420204          ORR      r2,r2,#4
000f4a  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.3916|
;;;1285       }
;;;1286   
;;;1287       /* Enable RX overrun interrupt flag */
;;;1288       if((u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_RXOV_INT_MASK) == SPI_FIFO_RXOV_INT_MASK)
000f4c  058a              LSLS     r2,r1,#22
000f4e  d503              BPL      |L1.3928|
;;;1289       {
;;;1290           spi->FIFOCTL |= SPI_FIFOCTL_RXOVIEN_Msk;
000f50  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
000f52  f0420220          ORR      r2,r2,#0x20
000f56  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.3928|
;;;1291       }
;;;1292   
;;;1293       /* Enable RX time-out interrupt flag */
;;;1294       if((u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_RXTO_INT_MASK) == SPI_FIFO_RXTO_INT_MASK)
000f58  0549              LSLS     r1,r1,#21
000f5a  d503              BPL      |L1.3940|
;;;1295       {
;;;1296           spi->FIFOCTL |= SPI_FIFOCTL_RXTOIEN_Msk;
000f5c  6901              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x10]
000f5e  f0410110          ORR      r1,r1,#0x10
000f62  6101              STR      r1,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.3940|
;;;1297       }
;;;1298   }
000f64  4770              BX       lr
;;;1299   
                          ENDP

                  SPI_DisableInt PROC
;;;1319     */
;;;1320   void SPI_DisableInt(SPI_T *spi, uint32_t u32Mask)
000f66  07ca              LSLS     r2,r1,#31
;;;1321   {
000f68  d003              BEQ      |L1.3954|
;;;1322       /* Disable unit transfer interrupt flag */
;;;1323       if((u32Mask & SPI_UNIT_INT_MASK) == SPI_UNIT_INT_MASK)
;;;1324       {
;;;1325           spi->CTL &= ~SPI_CTL_UNITIEN_Msk;
000f6a  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]
000f6c  f4223200          BIC      r2,r2,#0x20000
000f70  6002              STR      r2,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.3954|
;;;1326       }
;;;1327   
;;;1328       /* Disable slave selection signal active interrupt flag */
;;;1329       if((u32Mask & SPI_SSACT_INT_MASK) == SPI_SSACT_INT_MASK)
000f72  078a              LSLS     r2,r1,#30
000f74  d503              BPL      |L1.3966|
;;;1330       {
;;;1331           spi->SSCTL &= ~SPI_SSCTL_SSACTIEN_Msk;
000f76  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]
000f78  f4225280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x1000
000f7c  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]
                  |L1.3966|
;;;1332       }
;;;1333   
;;;1334       /* Disable slave selection signal inactive interrupt flag */
;;;1335       if((u32Mask & SPI_SSINACT_INT_MASK) == SPI_SSINACT_INT_MASK)
000f7e  074a              LSLS     r2,r1,#29
000f80  d503              BPL      |L1.3978|
;;;1336       {
;;;1337           spi->SSCTL &= ~SPI_SSCTL_SSINAIEN_Msk;
000f82  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]
000f84  f4225200          BIC      r2,r2,#0x2000
000f88  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]
                  |L1.3978|
;;;1338       }
;;;1339   
;;;1340       /* Disable slave TX under run interrupt flag */
;;;1341       if((u32Mask & SPI_SLVUR_INT_MASK) == SPI_SLVUR_INT_MASK)
000f8a  070a              LSLS     r2,r1,#28
000f8c  d503              BPL      |L1.3990|
;;;1342       {
;;;1343           spi->SSCTL &= ~SPI_SSCTL_SLVURIEN_Msk;
000f8e  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]
000f90  f4227200          BIC      r2,r2,#0x200
000f94  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]
                  |L1.3990|
;;;1344       }
;;;1345   
;;;1346       /* Disable slave bit count error interrupt flag */
;;;1347       if((u32Mask & SPI_SLVBE_INT_MASK) == SPI_SLVBE_INT_MASK)
000f96  06ca              LSLS     r2,r1,#27
000f98  d503              BPL      |L1.4002|
;;;1348       {
;;;1349           spi->SSCTL &= ~SPI_SSCTL_SLVBEIEN_Msk;
000f9a  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]
000f9c  f4227280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x100
000fa0  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]
                  |L1.4002|
;;;1350       }
;;;1351   
;;;1352       /* Disable slave TX underflow interrupt flag */
;;;1353       if((u32Mask & SPI_TXUF_INT_MASK) == SPI_TXUF_INT_MASK)
000fa2  064a              LSLS     r2,r1,#25
000fa4  d503              BPL      |L1.4014|
;;;1354       {
;;;1355           spi->FIFOCTL &= ~SPI_FIFOCTL_TXUFIEN_Msk;
000fa6  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
000fa8  f0220280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x80
000fac  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.4014|
;;;1356       }
;;;1357   
;;;1358       /* Disable TX threshold interrupt flag */
;;;1359       if((u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_TXTH_INT_MASK) == SPI_FIFO_TXTH_INT_MASK)
000fae  060a              LSLS     r2,r1,#24
000fb0  d503              BPL      |L1.4026|
;;;1360       {
;;;1361           spi->FIFOCTL &= ~SPI_FIFOCTL_TXTHIEN_Msk;
000fb2  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
000fb4  f0220208          BIC      r2,r2,#8
000fb8  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.4026|
;;;1362       }
;;;1363   
;;;1364       /* Disable RX threshold interrupt flag */
;;;1365       if((u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_RXTH_INT_MASK) == SPI_FIFO_RXTH_INT_MASK)
000fba  05ca              LSLS     r2,r1,#23
000fbc  d503              BPL      |L1.4038|
;;;1366       {
;;;1367           spi->FIFOCTL &= ~SPI_FIFOCTL_RXTHIEN_Msk;
000fbe  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
000fc0  f0220204          BIC      r2,r2,#4
000fc4  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.4038|
;;;1368       }
;;;1369   
;;;1370       /* Disable RX overrun interrupt flag */
;;;1371       if((u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_RXOV_INT_MASK) == SPI_FIFO_RXOV_INT_MASK)
000fc6  058a              LSLS     r2,r1,#22
000fc8  d503              BPL      |L1.4050|
;;;1372       {
;;;1373           spi->FIFOCTL &= ~SPI_FIFOCTL_RXOVIEN_Msk;
000fca  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
000fcc  f0220220          BIC      r2,r2,#0x20
000fd0  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.4050|
;;;1374       }
;;;1375   
;;;1376       /* Disable RX time-out interrupt flag */
;;;1377       if((u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_RXTO_INT_MASK) == SPI_FIFO_RXTO_INT_MASK)
000fd2  0549              LSLS     r1,r1,#21
000fd4  d503              BPL      |L1.4062|
;;;1378       {
;;;1379           spi->FIFOCTL &= ~SPI_FIFOCTL_RXTOIEN_Msk;
000fd6  6901              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x10]
000fd8  f0210110          BIC      r1,r1,#0x10
000fdc  6101              STR      r1,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.4062|
;;;1380       }
;;;1381   }
000fde  4770              BX       lr
;;;1382   
                          ENDP

                  SPI_GetIntFlag PROC
;;;1402     */
;;;1403   uint32_t SPI_GetIntFlag(SPI_T *spi, uint32_t u32Mask)
000fe0  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1404   {
000fe2  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;1405       uint32_t u32IntFlag = 0U, u32TmpVal;
000fe4  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1406   
;;;1407       u32TmpVal = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_UNITIF_Msk;
000fe6  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
000fe8  f0030302          AND      r3,r3,#2
;;;1408       /* Check unit transfer interrupt flag */
;;;1409       if((u32Mask & SPI_UNIT_INT_MASK) && (u32TmpVal))
000fec  07cc              LSLS     r4,r1,#31
000fee  d001              BEQ      |L1.4084|
000ff0  b103              CBZ      r3,|L1.4084|
;;;1410       {
;;;1411           u32IntFlag |= SPI_UNIT_INT_MASK;
000ff2  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L1.4084|
;;;1412       }
;;;1413   
;;;1414       u32TmpVal = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_SSACTIF_Msk;
000ff4  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
000ff6  f0030304          AND      r3,r3,#4
;;;1415       /* Check slave selection signal active interrupt flag */
;;;1416       if((u32Mask & SPI_SSACT_INT_MASK) && (u32TmpVal))
000ffa  078c              LSLS     r4,r1,#30
000ffc  d502              BPL      |L1.4100|
000ffe  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4100|
;;;1417       {
;;;1418           u32IntFlag |= SPI_SSACT_INT_MASK;
001000  f0400002          ORR      r0,r0,#2
                  |L1.4100|
;;;1419       }
;;;1420   
;;;1421       u32TmpVal = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_SSINAIF_Msk;
001004  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
001006  f0030308          AND      r3,r3,#8
;;;1422       /* Check slave selection signal inactive interrupt flag */
;;;1423       if((u32Mask & SPI_SSINACT_INT_MASK) && (u32TmpVal))
00100a  074c              LSLS     r4,r1,#29
00100c  d502              BPL      |L1.4116|
00100e  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4116|
;;;1424       {
;;;1425           u32IntFlag |= SPI_SSINACT_INT_MASK;
001010  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
                  |L1.4116|
;;;1426       }
;;;1427   
;;;1428       u32TmpVal = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_SLVURIF_Msk;
001014  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
001016  f0030380          AND      r3,r3,#0x80
;;;1429       /* Check slave TX under run interrupt flag */
;;;1430       if((u32Mask & SPI_SLVUR_INT_MASK) && (u32TmpVal))
00101a  070c              LSLS     r4,r1,#28
00101c  d502              BPL      |L1.4132|
00101e  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4132|
;;;1431       {
;;;1432           u32IntFlag |= SPI_SLVUR_INT_MASK;
001020  f0400008          ORR      r0,r0,#8
                  |L1.4132|
;;;1433       }
;;;1434   
;;;1435       u32TmpVal = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_SLVBEIF_Msk;
001024  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
001026  f0030340          AND      r3,r3,#0x40
;;;1436       /* Check slave bit count error interrupt flag */
;;;1437       if((u32Mask & SPI_SLVBE_INT_MASK) && (u32TmpVal))
00102a  06cc              LSLS     r4,r1,#27
00102c  d502              BPL      |L1.4148|
00102e  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4148|
;;;1438       {
;;;1439           u32IntFlag |= SPI_SLVBE_INT_MASK;
001030  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
                  |L1.4148|
;;;1440       }
;;;1441   
;;;1442       u32TmpVal = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_TXUFIF_Msk;
001034  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
001036  f4032300          AND      r3,r3,#0x80000
;;;1443       /* Check slave TX underflow interrupt flag */
;;;1444       if((u32Mask & SPI_TXUF_INT_MASK) && (u32TmpVal))
00103a  064c              LSLS     r4,r1,#25
00103c  d502              BPL      |L1.4164|
00103e  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4164|
;;;1445       {
;;;1446           u32IntFlag |= SPI_TXUF_INT_MASK;
001040  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40
                  |L1.4164|
;;;1447       }
;;;1448   
;;;1449       u32TmpVal = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_TXTHIF_Msk;
001044  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
001046  f4032380          AND      r3,r3,#0x40000
;;;1450       /* Check TX threshold interrupt flag */
;;;1451       if((u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_TXTH_INT_MASK) && (u32TmpVal))
00104a  060c              LSLS     r4,r1,#24
00104c  d502              BPL      |L1.4180|
00104e  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4180|
;;;1452       {
;;;1453           u32IntFlag |= SPI_FIFO_TXTH_INT_MASK;
001050  f0400080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x80
                  |L1.4180|
;;;1454       }
;;;1455   
;;;1456       u32TmpVal = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_RXTHIF_Msk;
001054  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
001056  f4036380          AND      r3,r3,#0x400
;;;1457       /* Check RX threshold interrupt flag */
;;;1458       if((u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_RXTH_INT_MASK) && (u32TmpVal))
00105a  05cc              LSLS     r4,r1,#23
00105c  d502              BPL      |L1.4196|
00105e  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4196|
;;;1459       {
;;;1460           u32IntFlag |= SPI_FIFO_RXTH_INT_MASK;
001060  f4407080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x100
                  |L1.4196|
;;;1461       }
;;;1462   
;;;1463       u32TmpVal = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_RXOVIF_Msk;
001064  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
001066  f4036300          AND      r3,r3,#0x800
;;;1464       /* Check RX overrun interrupt flag */
;;;1465       if((u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_RXOV_INT_MASK) && (u32TmpVal))
00106a  058c              LSLS     r4,r1,#22
00106c  d502              BPL      |L1.4212|
00106e  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4212|
;;;1466       {
;;;1467           u32IntFlag |= SPI_FIFO_RXOV_INT_MASK;
001070  f4407000          ORR      r0,r0,#0x200
                  |L1.4212|
;;;1468       }
;;;1469   
;;;1470       u32TmpVal = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_RXTOIF_Msk;
001074  6952              LDR      r2,[r2,#0x14]
001076  f4025280          AND      r2,r2,#0x1000
;;;1471       /* Check RX time-out interrupt flag */
;;;1472       if((u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_RXTO_INT_MASK) && (u32TmpVal))
00107a  0549              LSLS     r1,r1,#21
00107c  d503              BPL      |L1.4230|
00107e  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
001080  d001              BEQ      |L1.4230|
;;;1473       {
;;;1474           u32IntFlag |= SPI_FIFO_RXTO_INT_MASK;
001082  f4406080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x400
                  |L1.4230|
;;;1475       }
;;;1476   
;;;1477       return u32IntFlag;
;;;1478   }
001086  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1479   
                          ENDP

                  SPI_ClearIntFlag PROC
;;;1497     */
;;;1498   void SPI_ClearIntFlag(SPI_T *spi, uint32_t u32Mask)
001088  07ca              LSLS     r2,r1,#31
;;;1499   {
00108a  d001              BEQ      |L1.4240|
;;;1500       if(u32Mask & SPI_UNIT_INT_MASK)
;;;1501       {
;;;1502           spi->STATUS = SPI_STATUS_UNITIF_Msk; /* Clear unit transfer interrupt flag */
00108c  2202              MOVS     r2,#2
00108e  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
                  |L1.4240|
;;;1503       }
;;;1504   
;;;1505       if(u32Mask & SPI_SSACT_INT_MASK)
001090  078a              LSLS     r2,r1,#30
001092  d501              BPL      |L1.4248|
;;;1506       {
;;;1507           spi->STATUS = SPI_STATUS_SSACTIF_Msk; /* Clear slave selection signal active interrupt flag */
001094  2204              MOVS     r2,#4
001096  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
                  |L1.4248|
;;;1508       }
;;;1509   
;;;1510       if(u32Mask & SPI_SSINACT_INT_MASK)
001098  074a              LSLS     r2,r1,#29
00109a  d501              BPL      |L1.4256|
;;;1511       {
;;;1512           spi->STATUS = SPI_STATUS_SSINAIF_Msk; /* Clear slave selection signal inactive interrupt flag */
00109c  2208              MOVS     r2,#8
00109e  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
                  |L1.4256|
;;;1513       }
;;;1514   
;;;1515       if(u32Mask & SPI_SLVUR_INT_MASK)
0010a0  070a              LSLS     r2,r1,#28
0010a2  d501              BPL      |L1.4264|
;;;1516       {
;;;1517           spi->STATUS = SPI_STATUS_SLVURIF_Msk; /* Clear slave TX under run interrupt flag */
0010a4  2280              MOVS     r2,#0x80
0010a6  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
                  |L1.4264|
;;;1518       }
;;;1519   
;;;1520       if(u32Mask & SPI_SLVBE_INT_MASK)
0010a8  06ca              LSLS     r2,r1,#27
0010aa  d501              BPL      |L1.4272|
;;;1521       {
;;;1522           spi->STATUS = SPI_STATUS_SLVBEIF_Msk; /* Clear slave bit count error interrupt flag */
0010ac  2240              MOVS     r2,#0x40
0010ae  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
                  |L1.4272|
;;;1523       }
;;;1524   
;;;1525       if(u32Mask & SPI_TXUF_INT_MASK)
0010b0  064a              LSLS     r2,r1,#25
0010b2  d502              BPL      |L1.4282|
;;;1526       {
;;;1527           spi->STATUS = SPI_STATUS_TXUFIF_Msk; /* Clear slave TX underflow interrupt flag */
0010b4  f44f2200          MOV      r2,#0x80000
0010b8  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
                  |L1.4282|
;;;1528       }
;;;1529   
;;;1530       if(u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_RXOV_INT_MASK)
0010ba  058a              LSLS     r2,r1,#22
0010bc  d502              BPL      |L1.4292|
;;;1531       {
;;;1532           spi->STATUS = SPI_STATUS_RXOVIF_Msk; /* Clear RX overrun interrupt flag */
0010be  f44f6200          MOV      r2,#0x800
0010c2  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
                  |L1.4292|
;;;1533       }
;;;1534   
;;;1535       if(u32Mask & SPI_FIFO_RXTO_INT_MASK)
0010c4  0549              LSLS     r1,r1,#21
0010c6  d502              BPL      |L1.4302|
;;;1536       {
;;;1537           spi->STATUS = SPI_STATUS_RXTOIF_Msk; /* Clear RX time-out interrupt flag */
0010c8  f44f5180          MOV      r1,#0x1000
0010cc  6141              STR      r1,[r0,#0x14]
                  |L1.4302|
;;;1538       }
;;;1539   }
0010ce  4770              BX       lr
;;;1540   
                          ENDP

                  SPI_GetStatus PROC
;;;1558     */
;;;1559   uint32_t SPI_GetStatus(SPI_T *spi, uint32_t u32Mask)
0010d0  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1560   {
0010d2  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;1561       uint32_t u32Flag = 0U, u32TmpValue;
0010d4  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1562   
;;;1563       u32TmpValue = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_BUSY_Msk;
0010d6  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
0010d8  f0030301          AND      r3,r3,#1
;;;1564       /* Check busy status */
;;;1565       if((u32Mask & SPI_BUSY_MASK) && (u32TmpValue))
0010dc  07cc              LSLS     r4,r1,#31
0010de  d001              BEQ      |L1.4324|
0010e0  b103              CBZ      r3,|L1.4324|
;;;1566       {
;;;1567           u32Flag |= SPI_BUSY_MASK;
0010e2  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L1.4324|
;;;1568       }
;;;1569   
;;;1570       u32TmpValue = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_RXEMPTY_Msk;
0010e4  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
0010e6  f4037380          AND      r3,r3,#0x100
;;;1571       /* Check RX empty flag */
;;;1572       if((u32Mask & SPI_RX_EMPTY_MASK) && (u32TmpValue))
0010ea  078c              LSLS     r4,r1,#30
0010ec  d502              BPL      |L1.4340|
0010ee  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4340|
;;;1573       {
;;;1574           u32Flag |= SPI_RX_EMPTY_MASK;
0010f0  f0400002          ORR      r0,r0,#2
                  |L1.4340|
;;;1575       }
;;;1576   
;;;1577       u32TmpValue = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_RXFULL_Msk;
0010f4  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
0010f6  f4037300          AND      r3,r3,#0x200
;;;1578       /* Check RX full flag */
;;;1579       if((u32Mask & SPI_RX_FULL_MASK) && (u32TmpValue))
0010fa  074c              LSLS     r4,r1,#29
0010fc  d502              BPL      |L1.4356|
0010fe  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4356|
;;;1580       {
;;;1581           u32Flag |= SPI_RX_FULL_MASK;
001100  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
                  |L1.4356|
;;;1582       }
;;;1583   
;;;1584       u32TmpValue = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_TXEMPTY_Msk;
001104  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
001106  f4033380          AND      r3,r3,#0x10000
;;;1585       /* Check TX empty flag */
;;;1586       if((u32Mask & SPI_TX_EMPTY_MASK) && (u32TmpValue))
00110a  070c              LSLS     r4,r1,#28
00110c  d502              BPL      |L1.4372|
00110e  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4372|
;;;1587       {
;;;1588           u32Flag |= SPI_TX_EMPTY_MASK;
001110  f0400008          ORR      r0,r0,#8
                  |L1.4372|
;;;1589       }
;;;1590   
;;;1591       u32TmpValue = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_TXFULL_Msk;
001114  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
001116  f4033300          AND      r3,r3,#0x20000
;;;1592       /* Check TX full flag */
;;;1593       if((u32Mask & SPI_TX_FULL_MASK) && (u32TmpValue))
00111a  06cc              LSLS     r4,r1,#27
00111c  d502              BPL      |L1.4388|
00111e  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4388|
;;;1594       {
;;;1595           u32Flag |= SPI_TX_FULL_MASK;
001120  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
                  |L1.4388|
;;;1596       }
;;;1597   
;;;1598       u32TmpValue = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_TXRXRST_Msk;
001124  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
001126  f4030300          AND      r3,r3,#0x800000
;;;1599       /* Check TX/RX reset flag */
;;;1600       if((u32Mask & SPI_TXRX_RESET_MASK) && (u32TmpValue))
00112a  068c              LSLS     r4,r1,#26
00112c  d502              BPL      |L1.4404|
00112e  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4404|
;;;1601       {
;;;1602           u32Flag |= SPI_TXRX_RESET_MASK;
001130  f0400020          ORR      r0,r0,#0x20
                  |L1.4404|
;;;1603       }
;;;1604   
;;;1605       u32TmpValue = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_SPIENSTS_Msk;
001134  6953              LDR      r3,[r2,#0x14]
001136  f4034300          AND      r3,r3,#0x8000
;;;1606       /* Check SPIEN flag */
;;;1607       if((u32Mask & SPI_SPIEN_STS_MASK) && (u32TmpValue))
00113a  064c              LSLS     r4,r1,#25
00113c  d502              BPL      |L1.4420|
00113e  b10b              CBZ      r3,|L1.4420|
;;;1608       {
;;;1609           u32Flag |= SPI_SPIEN_STS_MASK;
001140  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40
                  |L1.4420|
;;;1610       }
;;;1611   
;;;1612       u32TmpValue = spi->STATUS & SPI_STATUS_SSLINE_Msk;
001144  6952              LDR      r2,[r2,#0x14]
001146  f0020210          AND      r2,r2,#0x10
;;;1613       /* Check SPIx_SS line status */
;;;1614       if((u32Mask & SPI_SSLINE_STS_MASK) && (u32TmpValue))
00114a  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24
00114c  d503              BPL      |L1.4438|
00114e  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
001150  d001              BEQ      |L1.4438|
;;;1615       {
;;;1616           u32Flag |= SPI_SSLINE_STS_MASK;
001152  f0400080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x80
                  |L1.4438|
;;;1617       }
;;;1618   
;;;1619       return u32Flag;
;;;1620   }
001156  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1621   
                          ENDP

                  SPI_GetStatus2 PROC
;;;1632     */
;;;1633   uint32_t SPI_GetStatus2(SPI_T *spi, uint32_t u32Mask)
001158  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;1634   {
;;;1635       uint32_t u32TmpStatus;
;;;1636       uint32_t u32Number = 0U;
00115a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1637   
;;;1638       u32TmpStatus = spi->STATUS2;
00115c  6992              LDR      r2,[r2,#0x18]
;;;1639   
;;;1640       /* Check effective bit number of uncompleted RX data status */
;;;1641       if(u32Mask & SPI_SLVBENUM_MASK)
00115e  07c9              LSLS     r1,r1,#31
001160  d001              BEQ      |L1.4454|
;;;1642       {
;;;1643           u32Number = (u32TmpStatus & SPI_STATUS2_SLVBENUM_Msk) >> SPI_STATUS2_SLVBENUM_Pos;
001162  f3c26005          UBFX     r0,r2,#24,#6
                  |L1.4454|
;;;1644       }
;;;1645   
;;;1646       return u32Number;
;;;1647   }
001166  4770              BX       lr
;;;1648   
                          ENDP

                  SPII2S_GetSourceClockFreq PROC
;;;1655     */
;;;1656   static uint32_t SPII2S_GetSourceClockFreq(SPI_T *i2s)
001168  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1657   {
;;;1658       uint32_t u32Freq;
;;;1659   
;;;1660       if(i2s == SPI0)
00116a  4cfe              LDR      r4,|L1.5476|
;;;1661       {
;;;1662           if((CLK->CLKSEL2 & CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI0SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI0SEL_HXT)
;;;1663           {
;;;1664               u32Freq = __HXT; /* Clock source is HXT */
00116c  49fe              LDR      r1,|L1.5480|
00116e  04a2              LSLS     r2,r4,#18             ;1662
;;;1665           }
;;;1666           else if((CLK->CLKSEL2 & CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI0SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI0SEL_PLL_DIV2)
;;;1667           {
;;;1668               u32Freq = (CLK_GetPLLClockFreq() >> 1); /* Clock source is PLL/2 */
;;;1669           }
;;;1670           else if((CLK->CLKSEL2 & CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI0SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI0SEL_PCLK1)
;;;1671           {
;;;1672               u32Freq = CLK_GetPCLK1Freq(); /* Clock source is PCLK1 */
;;;1673           }
;;;1674           else if((CLK->CLKSEL2 & CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI0SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI0SEL_HIRC)
;;;1675           {
;;;1676               u32Freq = __HIRC; /* Clock source is HIRC */
;;;1677           }
;;;1678           else if((CLK->CLKSEL2 & CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI0SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI0SEL_HIRC48M)
;;;1679           {
;;;1680               u32Freq = __HIRC48M; /* Clock source is RC48M */
001170  008b              LSLS     r3,r1,#2
001172  42a0              CMP      r0,r4                 ;1660
001174  d12e              BNE      |L1.4564|
001176  f8d20218          LDR      r0,[r2,#0x218]        ;1662
00117a  f0100f70          TST      r0,#0x70              ;1662
00117e  d01b              BEQ      |L1.4536|
001180  f8d20218          LDR      r0,[r2,#0x218]        ;1666
001184  f3c01002          UBFX     r0,r0,#4,#3           ;1666
001188  2801              CMP      r0,#1                 ;1666
00118a  d017              BEQ      |L1.4540|
00118c  f8d20218          LDR      r0,[r2,#0x218]        ;1670
001190  f3c01002          UBFX     r0,r0,#4,#3           ;1670
001194  2802              CMP      r0,#2                 ;1670
001196  d015              BEQ      |L1.4548|
001198  f8d20218          LDR      r0,[r2,#0x218]        ;1674
00119c  f3c01002          UBFX     r0,r0,#4,#3           ;1674
0011a0  2803              CMP      r0,#3                 ;1674
0011a2  d013              BEQ      |L1.4556|
0011a4  f8d20218          LDR      r0,[r2,#0x218]        ;1678
0011a8  f3c01002          UBFX     r0,r0,#4,#3           ;1678
0011ac  2804              CMP      r0,#4                 ;1678
0011ae  d00f              BEQ      |L1.4560|
;;;1681           }
;;;1682           else
;;;1683           {
;;;1684               u32Freq = (CLK_GetPLLFNClockFreq() >> 1); /* Clock source is PLLFN/2 */
0011b0  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_GetPLLFNClockFreq
0011b4  0840              LSRS     r0,r0,#1
;;;1685           }
;;;1686       }
;;;1687       else if(i2s == SPI1)
;;;1688       {
;;;1689           if((CLK->CLKSEL2 & CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI1SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI1SEL_HXT)
;;;1690           {
;;;1691               u32Freq = __HXT; /* Clock source is HXT */
;;;1692           }
;;;1693           else if((CLK->CLKSEL2 & CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI1SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI1SEL_PLL_DIV2)
;;;1694           {
;;;1695               u32Freq = (CLK_GetPLLClockFreq() >> 1); /* Clock source is PLL/2 */
;;;1696           }
;;;1697           else if((CLK->CLKSEL2 & CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI1SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI1SEL_PCLK0)
;;;1698           {
;;;1699               u32Freq = CLK_GetPCLK0Freq(); /* Clock source is PCLK0 */
;;;1700           }
;;;1701           else if((CLK->CLKSEL2 & CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI1SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI1SEL_HIRC)
;;;1702           {
;;;1703               u32Freq = __HIRC; /* Clock source is HIRC */
;;;1704           }
;;;1705           else if((CLK->CLKSEL2 & CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI1SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI1SEL_HIRC48M)
;;;1706           {
;;;1707               u32Freq = __HIRC48M; /* Clock source is RC48M */
;;;1708           }
;;;1709           else
;;;1710           {
;;;1711               u32Freq = (CLK_GetPLLFNClockFreq() >> 1); /* Clock source is PLLFN/2 */
;;;1712           }
;;;1713       }
;;;1714       else if(i2s == SPI2)
;;;1715       {
;;;1716           if((CLK->CLKSEL3 & CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI2SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI2SEL_HXT)
;;;1717           {
;;;1718               u32Freq = __HXT; /* Clock source is HXT */
;;;1719           }
;;;1720           else if((CLK->CLKSEL3 & CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI2SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI2SEL_PLL_DIV2)
;;;1721           {
;;;1722               u32Freq = (CLK_GetPLLClockFreq() >> 1); /* Clock source is PLL/2 */
;;;1723           }
;;;1724           else if((CLK->CLKSEL3 & CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI2SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI2SEL_PCLK1)
;;;1725           {
;;;1726               u32Freq = CLK_GetPCLK1Freq(); /* Clock source is PCLK1 */
;;;1727           }
;;;1728           else if((CLK->CLKSEL3 & CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI2SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI2SEL_HIRC)
;;;1729           {
;;;1730               u32Freq = __HIRC; /* Clock source is HIRC */
;;;1731           }
;;;1732           else if((CLK->CLKSEL3 & CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI2SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI2SEL_HIRC48M)
;;;1733           {
;;;1734               u32Freq = __HIRC48M; /* Clock source is RC48M */
;;;1735           }
;;;1736           else
;;;1737           {
;;;1738               u32Freq = (CLK_GetPLLFNClockFreq() >> 1); /* Clock source is PLLFN/2 */
;;;1739           }
;;;1740       }
;;;1741       else
;;;1742       {
;;;1743           if((CLK->CLKSEL3 & CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI3SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI3SEL_HXT)
;;;1744           {
;;;1745               u32Freq = __HXT; /* Clock source is HXT */
;;;1746           }
;;;1747           else if((CLK->CLKSEL3 & CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI3SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI3SEL_PLL_DIV2)
;;;1748           {
;;;1749               u32Freq = (CLK_GetPLLClockFreq() >> 1); /* Clock source is PLL/2 */
;;;1750           }
;;;1751           else if((CLK->CLKSEL3 & CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI3SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI3SEL_PCLK0)
;;;1752           {
;;;1753               u32Freq = CLK_GetPCLK0Freq(); /* Clock source is PCLK0 */
;;;1754           }
;;;1755           else if((CLK->CLKSEL3 & CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI3SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI3SEL_HIRC)
;;;1756           {
;;;1757               u32Freq = __HIRC; /* Clock source is HIRC */
;;;1758           }
;;;1759           else if((CLK->CLKSEL3 & CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI3SEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI3SEL_HIRC48M)
;;;1760           {
;;;1761               u32Freq = __HIRC48M; /* Clock source is RC48M */
;;;1762           }
;;;1763           else
;;;1764           {
;;;1765               u32Freq = (CLK_GetPLLFNClockFreq() >> 1); /* Clock source is PLLFN/2 */
;;;1766           }
;;;1767       }
;;;1768   
;;;1769       return u32Freq;
;;;1770   }
0011b6  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L1.4536|
0011b8  4608              MOV      r0,r1                 ;1664
0011ba  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L1.4540|
0011bc  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_GetPLLClockFreq
0011c0  0840              LSRS     r0,r0,#1              ;1668
0011c2  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L1.4548|

                  |L1.4556|

                  |L1.4560|

                  SPII2S_Open PROC
;;;1797     */
;;;1798   uint32_t SPII2S_Open(SPI_T *i2s, uint32_t u32MasterSlave, uint32_t u32SampleRate, uint32_t u32WordWidth, uint32_t u32Channels, uint32_t u32DataFormat)
00130c  e92d5ff0          PUSH     {r4-r12,lr}
;;;1799   {
001310  4604              MOV      r4,r0
001312  460e              MOV      r6,r1
001314  e9dd010a          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x28]
001318  4693              MOV      r11,r2
00131a  461f              MOV      r7,r3
;;;1800       uint32_t u32Divider;
;;;1801       uint32_t u32BitRate, u32SrcClk, u32RetValue;
;;;1802   
;;;1803       /* Reset SPI/I2S */
;;;1804       if(i2s == SPI0)
00131c  f8df8244          LDR      r8,|L1.5476|
;;;1805       {
;;;1806           SYS->IPRST1 |= SYS_IPRST1_SPI0RST_Msk;
;;;1807           SYS->IPRST1 &= ~SYS_IPRST1_SPI0RST_Msk;
;;;1808       }
;;;1809       else if(i2s == SPI1)
001320  f8df9248          LDR      r9,|L1.5484|
;;;1810       {
;;;1811           SYS->IPRST1 |= SYS_IPRST1_SPI1RST_Msk;
;;;1812           SYS->IPRST1 &= ~SYS_IPRST1_SPI1RST_Msk;
;;;1813       }
;;;1814       else if(i2s == SPI2)
001324  f8dfa248          LDR      r10,|L1.5488|
001328  f04f4580          MOV      r5,#0x40000000        ;1806
00132c  4544              CMP      r4,r8                 ;1804
00132e  d108              BNE      |L1.4930|
001330  68ea              LDR      r2,[r5,#0xc]          ;1806
001332  f4425200          ORR      r2,r2,#0x2000         ;1806
001336  60ea              STR      r2,[r5,#0xc]          ;1806
001338  68ea              LDR      r2,[r5,#0xc]          ;1807
00133a  f4225200          BIC      r2,r2,#0x2000         ;1807
00133e  60ea              STR      r2,[r5,#0xc]          ;1807
001340  e01d              B        |L1.4990|
                  |L1.4930|
001342  454c              CMP      r4,r9                 ;1809
001344  d108              BNE      |L1.4952|
001346  68ea              LDR      r2,[r5,#0xc]          ;1811

00134c  60ea              STR      r2,[r5,#0xc]          ;1811
00134e  68ea              LDR      r2,[r5,#0xc]          ;1812
001350  f4224280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x4000         ;1812
001354  60ea              STR      r2,[r5,#0xc]          ;1812
001356  e012              B        |L1.4990|
                  |L1.4952|
001358  4554              CMP      r4,r10
00135a  d108              BNE      |L1.4974|
;;;1815       {
;;;1816           SYS->IPRST1 |= SYS_IPRST1_SPI2RST_Msk;
00135c  68ea              LDR      r2,[r5,#0xc]
00135e  f4424200          ORR      r2,r2,#0x8000
001362  60ea              STR      r2,[r5,#0xc]
;;;1817           SYS->IPRST1 &= ~SYS_IPRST1_SPI2RST_Msk;
001364  68ea              LDR      r2,[r5,#0xc]
001366  f4224200          BIC      r2,r2,#0x8000
00136a  60ea              STR      r2,[r5,#0xc]
00136c  e007              B        |L1.4990|
                  |L1.4974|
;;;1818       }
;;;1819       else
;;;1820       {
;;;1821           SYS->IPRST2 |= SYS_IPRST2_SPI3RST_Msk;

001370  f0420240          ORR      r2,r2,#0x40
001374  612a              STR      r2,[r5,#0x10]
;;;1822           SYS->IPRST2 &= ~SYS_IPRST2_SPI3RST_Msk;
001376  692a              LDR      r2,[r5,#0x10]
001378  f0220240          BIC      r2,r2,#0x40
00137c  612a              STR      r2,[r5,#0x10]
                  |L1.4990|
;;;1823       }
;;;1824   
;;;1825       /* Configure I2S controller */
;;;1826       i2s->I2SCTL = u32MasterSlave | u32WordWidth | u32Channels | u32DataFormat;

001382  4302              ORRS     r2,r2,r0
001384  430a              ORRS     r2,r2,r1
001386  6622              STR      r2,[r4,#0x60]
;;;1827       /* Set TX FIFO threshold to 2 and RX FIFO threshold to 1 */
;;;1828       SPII2S_SetFIFO(i2s, 2, 1);
001388  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00138a  2102              MOVS     r1,#2
00138c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00138e  f7fffffe          BL       SPII2S_SetFIFO
;;;1829   
;;;1830       if(u32MasterSlave == SPII2S_MODE_MASTER)
001392  0030              MOVS     r0,r6
;;;1831       {
;;;1832           /* Get the source clock rate */
;;;1833           u32SrcClk = SPII2S_GetSourceClockFreq(i2s);
;;;1834   
;;;1835           /* Calculate the bit clock rate */
;;;1836           u32BitRate = u32SampleRate * ((u32WordWidth >> SPI_I2SCTL_WDWIDTH_Pos) + 1U) * 16U;
;;;1837           u32Divider = ((((u32SrcClk * 10UL / u32BitRate) >> 1U) + 5UL) / 10UL) - 1U; /* Round to the nearest integer */
;;;1838           /* Set BCLKDIV setting */
;;;1839           i2s->I2SCLK = (i2s->I2SCLK & ~SPI_I2SCLK_BCLKDIV_Msk) | (u32Divider << SPI_I2SCLK_BCLKDIV_Pos);
001394  4e77              LDR      r6,|L1.5492|
001396  d018              BEQ      |L1.5066|
;;;1840           /* Enable I2S mode for the frequency of peripheral clock. */
;;;1841           i2s->I2SCLK |= SPI_I2SCLK_I2SMODE_Msk;
;;;1842   
;;;1843           /* Calculate bit clock rate */
;;;1844           u32BitRate = u32SrcClk / ((u32Divider + 1U) * 2U);
;;;1845           /* Calculate real sample rate */
;;;1846           u32SampleRate = u32BitRate / (((u32WordWidth >> SPI_I2SCTL_WDWIDTH_Pos) + 1U) * 16U);
;;;1847   
;;;1848           /* Enable TX function, RX function and I2S mode. */
;;;1849           i2s->I2SCTL |= (SPI_I2SCTL_RXEN_Msk | SPI_I2SCTL_TXEN_Msk | SPI_I2SCTL_I2SEN_Msk);
;;;1850   
;;;1851           /* Return the real sample rate */
;;;1852           u32RetValue = u32SampleRate;
;;;1853       }
;;;1854       else
;;;1855       {
;;;1856           /* Set BCLKDIV = 0 */
;;;1857           i2s->I2SCLK &= ~SPI_I2SCLK_BCLKDIV_Msk;

00139a  4030              ANDS     r0,r0,r6
00139c  6660              STR      r0,[r4,#0x64]
;;;1858   
;;;1859           if(i2s == SPI0)
00139e  4544              CMP      r4,r8
0013a0  d13f              BNE      |L1.5154|
;;;1860           {
;;;1861               /* Set the peripheral clock rate to equal APB clock rate */
;;;1862               CLK->CLKSEL2 = (CLK->CLKSEL2 & (~CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI0SEL_Msk)) | CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI0SEL_PCLK1;

0013aa  f0400020          ORR      r0,r0,#0x20
0013ae  f8c50218          STR      r0,[r5,#0x218]
;;;1863               /* Enable I2S slave mode and I2S mode for the frequency of peripheral clock. */
;;;1864               i2s->I2SCLK |= (SPI_I2SCLK_I2SSLAVE_Msk | SPI_I2SCLK_I2SMODE_Msk);
0013b2  6e60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x64]
0013b4  f0407040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x3000000
0013b8  6660              STR      r0,[r4,#0x64]
;;;1865               /* Enable TX function, RX function and I2S mode. */
;;;1866               i2s->I2SCTL |= (SPI_I2SCTL_RXEN_Msk | SPI_I2SCTL_TXEN_Msk | SPI_I2SCTL_I2SEN_Msk);
0013ba  6e20              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x60]
0013bc  f0400007          ORR      r0,r0,#7
0013c0  6620              STR      r0,[r4,#0x60]
;;;1867               /* Return slave peripheral clock rate */
;;;1868               u32RetValue = CLK_GetPCLK1Freq();
0013c2  e8bd5ff0          POP      {r4-r12,lr}
0013c6  f7ffbffe          B.W      CLK_GetPCLK1Freq
                  |L1.5066|
0013ca  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;1833
0013cc  f7fffffe          BL       SPII2S_GetSourceClockFreq
0013d0  4601              MOV      r1,r0                 ;1833
0013d2  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1836
0013d4  eb001217          ADD      r2,r0,r7,LSR #4       ;1836
0013d8  fb02f00b          MUL      r0,r2,r11             ;1836
0013dc  0100              LSLS     r0,r0,#4              ;1836
0013de  eb010381          ADD      r3,r1,r1,LSL #2       ;1837
0013e2  005b              LSLS     r3,r3,#1              ;1837
0013e4  fbb3f0f0          UDIV     r0,r3,r0              ;1837
0013e8  2305              MOVS     r3,#5                 ;1837
0013ea  eb030050          ADD      r0,r3,r0,LSR #1       ;1837
0013ee  230a              MOVS     r3,#0xa               ;1837
0013f0  fbb0f0f3          UDIV     r0,r0,r3              ;1837
0013f4  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1              ;1837
0013f6  6e63              LDR      r3,[r4,#0x64]         ;1839

0013fa  ea432300          ORR      r3,r3,r0,LSL #8       ;1839
0013fe  6663              STR      r3,[r4,#0x64]         ;1839
001400  6e63              LDR      r3,[r4,#0x64]         ;1841
001402  f0437380          ORR      r3,r3,#0x1000000      ;1841
001406  6663              STR      r3,[r4,#0x64]         ;1841

00140a  0040              LSLS     r0,r0,#1              ;1844
00140c  fbb1f0f0          UDIV     r0,r1,r0              ;1844

001418  f0410107          ORR      r1,r1,#7              ;1849
00141c  6621              STR      r1,[r4,#0x60]         ;1849
;;;1869           }
;;;1870           else if(i2s == SPI1)
;;;1871           {
;;;1872               /* Set the peripheral clock rate to equal APB clock rate */
;;;1873               CLK->CLKSEL2 = (CLK->CLKSEL2 & (~CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI1SEL_Msk)) | CLK_CLKSEL2_SPI1SEL_PCLK0;
;;;1874               /* Enable I2S slave mode and I2S mode for the frequency of peripheral clock. */
;;;1875               i2s->I2SCLK |= (SPI_I2SCLK_I2SSLAVE_Msk | SPI_I2SCLK_I2SMODE_Msk);
;;;1876               /* Enable TX function, RX function and I2S mode. */
;;;1877               i2s->I2SCTL |= (SPI_I2SCTL_RXEN_Msk | SPI_I2SCTL_TXEN_Msk | SPI_I2SCTL_I2SEN_Msk);
;;;1878               /* Return slave peripheral clock rate */
;;;1879               u32RetValue = CLK_GetPCLK0Freq();
;;;1880           }
;;;1881           else if(i2s == SPI2)
;;;1882           {
;;;1883               /* Set the peripheral clock rate to equal APB clock rate */
;;;1884               CLK->CLKSEL3 = (CLK->CLKSEL3 & (~CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI2SEL_Msk)) | CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI2SEL_PCLK1;
;;;1885               /* Enable I2S slave mode and I2S mode for the frequency of peripheral clock. */
;;;1886               i2s->I2SCLK |= (SPI_I2SCLK_I2SSLAVE_Msk | SPI_I2SCLK_I2SMODE_Msk);
;;;1887               /* Enable TX function, RX function and I2S mode. */
;;;1888               i2s->I2SCTL |= (SPI_I2SCTL_RXEN_Msk | SPI_I2SCTL_TXEN_Msk | SPI_I2SCTL_I2SEN_Msk);
;;;1889               /* Return slave peripheral clock rate */
;;;1890               u32RetValue = CLK_GetPCLK1Freq();
;;;1891           }
;;;1892           else
;;;1893           {
;;;1894               /* Set the peripheral clock rate to equal APB clock rate */
;;;1895               CLK->CLKSEL3 = (CLK->CLKSEL3 & (~CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI3SEL_Msk)) | CLK_CLKSEL3_SPI3SEL_PCLK0;
;;;1896               /* Enable I2S slave mode and I2S mode for the frequency of peripheral clock. */
;;;1897               i2s->I2SCLK |= (SPI_I2SCLK_I2SSLAVE_Msk | SPI_I2SCLK_I2SMODE_Msk);
;;;1898               /* Enable TX function, RX function and I2S mode. */
;;;1899               i2s->I2SCTL |= (SPI_I2SCTL_RXEN_Msk | SPI_I2SCTL_TXEN_Msk | SPI_I2SCTL_I2SEN_Msk);
;;;1900               /* Return slave peripheral clock rate */
;;;1901               u32RetValue = CLK_GetPCLK0Freq();
;;;1902           }
;;;1903       }
;;;1904   
;;;1905       return u32RetValue;
;;;1906   }
00141e  e8bd9ff0          POP      {r4-r12,pc}
                  |L1.5154|
001422  454c              CMP      r4,r9                 ;1870
001424  d113              BNE      |L1.5198|
001426  f8d50218          LDR      r0,[r5,#0x218]        ;1873
00142a  f42040e0          BIC      r0,r0,#0x7000         ;1873
00142e  f4405000          ORR      r0,r0,#0x2000         ;1873
001432  f8c50218          STR      r0,[r5,#0x218]        ;1873
001436  6e60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x64]         ;1875
001438  f0407040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x3000000      ;1875
00143c  6660              STR      r0,[r4,#0x64]         ;1875
00143e  6e20              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x60]         ;1877
001440  f0400007          ORR      r0,r0,#7              ;1877
001444  6620              STR      r0,[r4,#0x60]         ;1877
001446  e8bd5ff0          POP      {r4-r12,lr}           ;1879
00144a  f7ffbffe          B.W      CLK_GetPCLK0Freq
                  |L1.5198|
00144e  4554              CMP      r4,r10                ;1881
001450  d113              BNE      |L1.5242|
001452  f8d5021c          LDR      r0,[r5,#0x21c]        ;1884
001456  f4206060          BIC      r0,r0,#0xe00          ;1884
00145a  f4406080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x400          ;1884
00145e  f8c5021c          STR      r0,[r5,#0x21c]        ;1884
001462  6e60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x64]         ;1886
001464  f0407040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x3000000      ;1886
001468  6660              STR      r0,[r4,#0x64]         ;1886
00146a  6e20              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x60]         ;1888
00146c  f0400007          ORR      r0,r0,#7              ;1888
001470  6620              STR      r0,[r4,#0x60]         ;1888
001472  e8bd5ff0          POP      {r4-r12,lr}           ;1890
001476  f7ffbffe          B.W      CLK_GetPCLK1Freq
                  |L1.5242|
00147a  f8d5021c          LDR      r0,[r5,#0x21c]        ;1895
00147e  f42040e0          BIC      r0,r0,#0x7000         ;1895
001482  f4405000          ORR      r0,r0,#0x2000         ;1895
001486  f8c5021c          STR      r0,[r5,#0x21c]        ;1895
00148a  6e60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x64]         ;1897
00148c  f0407040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x3000000      ;1897
001490  6660              STR      r0,[r4,#0x64]         ;1897
001492  6e20              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x60]         ;1899
001494  f0400007          ORR      r0,r0,#7              ;1899
001498  6620              STR      r0,[r4,#0x60]         ;1899
00149a  e8bd5ff0          POP      {r4-r12,lr}           ;1901
00149e  f7ffbffe          B.W      CLK_GetPCLK0Freq
;;;1907   
                          ENDP

                  SPII2S_Close PROC
;;;1913     */
;;;1914   void SPII2S_Close(SPI_T *i2s)
0014a2  6e01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x60]
;;;1915   {
;;;1916       i2s->I2SCTL &= ~SPI_I2SCTL_I2SEN_Msk;
0014a4  f0210101          BIC      r1,r1,#1
0014a8  6601              STR      r1,[r0,#0x60]
;;;1917   }
0014aa  4770              BX       lr
;;;1918   
                          ENDP

                  SPII2S_EnableInt PROC
;;;1934     */
;;;1935   void SPII2S_EnableInt(SPI_T *i2s, uint32_t u32Mask)
0014ac  07ca              LSLS     r2,r1,#31
;;;1936   {
0014ae  d003              BEQ      |L1.5304|
;;;1937       /* Enable TX threshold interrupt flag */
;;;1938       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_FIFO_TXTH_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_FIFO_TXTH_INT_MASK)
;;;1939       {
;;;1940           i2s->FIFOCTL |= SPI_FIFOCTL_TXTHIEN_Msk;
0014b0  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
0014b2  f0420208          ORR      r2,r2,#8
0014b6  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.5304|
;;;1941       }
;;;1942   
;;;1943       /* Enable RX threshold interrupt flag */
;;;1944       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_FIFO_RXTH_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_FIFO_RXTH_INT_MASK)
0014b8  078a              LSLS     r2,r1,#30
0014ba  d503              BPL      |L1.5316|
;;;1945       {
;;;1946           i2s->FIFOCTL |= SPI_FIFOCTL_RXTHIEN_Msk;
0014bc  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
0014be  f0420204          ORR      r2,r2,#4
0014c2  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.5316|
;;;1947       }
;;;1948   
;;;1949       /* Enable RX overrun interrupt flag */
;;;1950       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_FIFO_RXOV_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_FIFO_RXOV_INT_MASK)
0014c4  074a              LSLS     r2,r1,#29
0014c6  d503              BPL      |L1.5328|
;;;1951       {
;;;1952           i2s->FIFOCTL |= SPI_FIFOCTL_RXOVIEN_Msk;
0014c8  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
0014ca  f0420220          ORR      r2,r2,#0x20
0014ce  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.5328|
;;;1953       }
;;;1954   
;;;1955       /* Enable RX time-out interrupt flag */
;;;1956       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_FIFO_RXTO_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_FIFO_RXTO_INT_MASK)
0014d0  070a              LSLS     r2,r1,#28
0014d2  d503              BPL      |L1.5340|
;;;1957       {
;;;1958           i2s->FIFOCTL |= SPI_FIFOCTL_RXTOIEN_Msk;
0014d4  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
0014d6  f0420210          ORR      r2,r2,#0x10
0014da  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.5340|
;;;1959       }
;;;1960   
;;;1961       /* Enable TX underflow interrupt flag */
;;;1962       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_TXUF_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_TXUF_INT_MASK)
0014dc  06ca              LSLS     r2,r1,#27
0014de  d503              BPL      |L1.5352|
;;;1963       {
;;;1964           i2s->FIFOCTL |= SPI_FIFOCTL_TXUFIEN_Msk;
0014e0  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
0014e2  f0420280          ORR      r2,r2,#0x80
0014e6  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.5352|
;;;1965       }
;;;1966   
;;;1967       /* Enable right channel zero cross interrupt flag */
;;;1968       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_RIGHT_ZC_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_RIGHT_ZC_INT_MASK)
0014e8  068a              LSLS     r2,r1,#26
0014ea  d503              BPL      |L1.5364|
;;;1969       {
;;;1970           i2s->I2SCTL |= SPI_I2SCTL_RZCIEN_Msk;
0014ec  6e02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x60]
0014ee  f0427280          ORR      r2,r2,#0x1000000
0014f2  6602              STR      r2,[r0,#0x60]
                  |L1.5364|
;;;1971       }
;;;1972   
;;;1973       /* Enable left channel zero cross interrupt flag */
;;;1974       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_LEFT_ZC_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_LEFT_ZC_INT_MASK)
0014f4  064a              LSLS     r2,r1,#25
0014f6  d503              BPL      |L1.5376|
;;;1975       {
;;;1976           i2s->I2SCTL |= SPI_I2SCTL_LZCIEN_Msk;
0014f8  6e02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x60]
0014fa  f0427200          ORR      r2,r2,#0x2000000
0014fe  6602              STR      r2,[r0,#0x60]
                  |L1.5376|
;;;1977       }
;;;1978       /* Enable bit clock loss interrupt flag */
;;;1979       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_SLAVE_ERR_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_SLAVE_ERR_INT_MASK)
001500  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24
001502  d503              BPL      |L1.5388|
;;;1980       {
;;;1981           i2s->I2SCTL |= SPI_I2SCTL_SLVERRIEN_Msk;
001504  6e01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x60]
001506  f0414100          ORR      r1,r1,#0x80000000
00150a  6601              STR      r1,[r0,#0x60]
                  |L1.5388|
;;;1982       }
;;;1983   }
00150c  4770              BX       lr
;;;1984   
                          ENDP

                  SPII2S_DisableInt PROC
;;;2000     */
;;;2001   void SPII2S_DisableInt(SPI_T *i2s, uint32_t u32Mask)
00150e  07ca              LSLS     r2,r1,#31
;;;2002   {
001510  d003              BEQ      |L1.5402|
;;;2003       /* Disable TX threshold interrupt flag */
;;;2004       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_FIFO_TXTH_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_FIFO_TXTH_INT_MASK)
;;;2005       {
;;;2006           i2s->FIFOCTL &= ~SPI_FIFOCTL_TXTHIEN_Msk;
001512  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
001514  f0220208          BIC      r2,r2,#8
001518  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.5402|
;;;2007       }
;;;2008   
;;;2009       /* Disable RX threshold interrupt flag */
;;;2010       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_FIFO_RXTH_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_FIFO_RXTH_INT_MASK)
00151a  078a              LSLS     r2,r1,#30
00151c  d503              BPL      |L1.5414|
;;;2011       {
;;;2012           i2s->FIFOCTL &= ~SPI_FIFOCTL_RXTHIEN_Msk;
00151e  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
001520  f0220204          BIC      r2,r2,#4
001524  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.5414|
;;;2013       }
;;;2014   
;;;2015       /* Disable RX overrun interrupt flag */
;;;2016       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_FIFO_RXOV_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_FIFO_RXOV_INT_MASK)
001526  074a              LSLS     r2,r1,#29
001528  d503              BPL      |L1.5426|
;;;2017       {
;;;2018           i2s->FIFOCTL &= ~SPI_FIFOCTL_RXOVIEN_Msk;
00152a  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
00152c  f0220220          BIC      r2,r2,#0x20
001530  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.5426|
;;;2019       }
;;;2020   
;;;2021       /* Disable RX time-out interrupt flag */
;;;2022       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_FIFO_RXTO_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_FIFO_RXTO_INT_MASK)
001532  070a              LSLS     r2,r1,#28
001534  d503              BPL      |L1.5438|
;;;2023       {
;;;2024           i2s->FIFOCTL &= ~SPI_FIFOCTL_RXTOIEN_Msk;
001536  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
001538  f0220210          BIC      r2,r2,#0x10
00153c  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.5438|
;;;2025       }
;;;2026   
;;;2027       /* Disable TX underflow interrupt flag */
;;;2028       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_TXUF_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_TXUF_INT_MASK)
00153e  06ca              LSLS     r2,r1,#27
001540  d503              BPL      |L1.5450|
;;;2029       {
;;;2030           i2s->FIFOCTL &= ~SPI_FIFOCTL_TXUFIEN_Msk;
001542  6902              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
001544  f0220280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x80
001548  6102              STR      r2,[r0,#0x10]
                  |L1.5450|
;;;2031       }
;;;2032   
;;;2033       /* Disable right channel zero cross interrupt flag */
;;;2034       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_RIGHT_ZC_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_RIGHT_ZC_INT_MASK)
00154a  068a              LSLS     r2,r1,#26
00154c  d503              BPL      |L1.5462|
;;;2035       {
;;;2036           i2s->I2SCTL &= ~SPI_I2SCTL_RZCIEN_Msk;
00154e  6e02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x60]
001550  f0227280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x1000000
001554  6602              STR      r2,[r0,#0x60]
                  |L1.5462|
;;;2037       }
;;;2038   
;;;2039       /* Disable left channel zero cross interrupt flag */
;;;2040       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_LEFT_ZC_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_LEFT_ZC_INT_MASK)
001556  064a              LSLS     r2,r1,#25
001558  d503              BPL      |L1.5474|
;;;2041       {
;;;2042           i2s->I2SCTL &= ~SPI_I2SCTL_LZCIEN_Msk;
00155a  6e02              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x60]
00155c  f0227200          BIC      r2,r2,#0x2000000
001560  6602              STR      r2,[r0,#0x60]
                  |L1.5474|
;;;2043       }
;;;2044       /* Disable bit clock loss interrupt flag */
;;;2045       if((u32Mask & SPII2S_SLAVE_ERR_INT_MASK) == SPII2S_SLAVE_ERR_INT_MASK)
001562  e009              B        |L1.5496|
                  |L1.5476|
                          DCD      0x40061000
                  |L1.5480|
                          DCD      0x00b71b00
                  |L1.5484|
                          DCD      0x40062000
                  |L1.5488|
                          DCD      0x40063000
                  |L1.5492|
                          DCD      0xfffc00ff
                  |L1.5496|
001578  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24
00157a  d503              BPL      |L1.5508|
;;;2046       {
;;;2047           i2s->I2SCTL &= ~SPI_I2SCTL_SLVERRIEN_Msk;
00157c  6e01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x60]
00157e  f0214100          BIC      r1,r1,#0x80000000
001582  6601              STR      r1,[r0,#0x60]
                  |L1.5508|
;;;2048       }
;;;2049   }
001584  4770              BX       lr
;;;2050   
                          ENDP

                  SPII2S_EnableMCLK PROC
;;;2058     */
;;;2059   uint32_t SPII2S_EnableMCLK(SPI_T *i2s, uint32_t u32BusClock)
001586  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;2060   {
001588  4604              MOV      r4,r0
00158a  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;2061       uint32_t u32Divider;
;;;2062       uint32_t u32SrcClk, u32RetValue;
;;;2063   
;;;2064       u32SrcClk = SPII2S_GetSourceClockFreq(i2s);
00158c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00158e  f7fffffe          BL       SPII2S_GetSourceClockFreq
;;;2065       if(u32BusClock == u32SrcClk)
001592  4285              CMP      r5,r0
001594  d101              BNE      |L1.5530|
;;;2066       {
;;;2067           u32Divider = 0U;
001596  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
001598  e005              B        |L1.5542|
                  |L1.5530|
;;;2068       }
;;;2069       else
;;;2070       {
;;;2071           u32Divider = (u32SrcClk / u32BusClock) >> 1U;
00159a  fbb0f1f5          UDIV     r1,r0,r5
00159e  0849              LSRS     r1,r1,#1
;;;2072           /* MCLKDIV is a 7-bit width configuration. The maximum value is 0x7F. */
;;;2073           if(u32Divider > 0x7FU)
0015a0  297f              CMP      r1,#0x7f
0015a2  d900              BLS      |L1.5542|
;;;2074           {
;;;2075               u32Divider = 0x7FU;
0015a4  217f              MOVS     r1,#0x7f
                  |L1.5542|
;;;2076           }
;;;2077       }
;;;2078   
;;;2079       /* Write u32Divider to MCLKDIV (SPI_I2SCLK[6:0]) */
;;;2080       i2s->I2SCLK = (i2s->I2SCLK & ~SPI_I2SCLK_MCLKDIV_Msk) | (u32Divider << SPI_I2SCLK_MCLKDIV_Pos);
0015a6  6e62              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x64]
0015a8  f022027f          BIC      r2,r2,#0x7f
0015ac  430a              ORRS     r2,r2,r1
0015ae  6662              STR      r2,[r4,#0x64]
;;;2081   
;;;2082       /* Enable MCLK output */
;;;2083       i2s->I2SCTL |= SPI_I2SCTL_MCLKEN_Msk;
0015b0  6e22              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x60]
0015b2  f4424200          ORR      r2,r2,#0x8000
0015b6  6622              STR      r2,[r4,#0x60]
;;;2084   
;;;2085       if(u32Divider == 0U)
0015b8  2900              CMP      r1,#0
0015ba  d002              BEQ      |L1.5570|
;;;2086       {
;;;2087           u32RetValue = u32SrcClk; /* If MCLKDIV=0, master clock rate is equal to the source clock rate. */
;;;2088       }
;;;2089       else
;;;2090       {
;;;2091           u32RetValue = ((u32SrcClk >> 1U) / u32Divider); /* If MCLKDIV>0, master clock rate = source clock rate / (MCLKDIV * 2) */
0015bc  0840              LSRS     r0,r0,#1
0015be  fbb0f0f1          UDIV     r0,r0,r1
                  |L1.5570|
;;;2092       }
;;;2093   
;;;2094       return u32RetValue;
;;;2095   }
0015c2  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;2096   
                          ENDP

                  SPII2S_DisableMCLK PROC
;;;2102     */
;;;2103   void SPII2S_DisableMCLK(SPI_T *i2s)
0015c4  6e01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x60]
;;;2104   {
;;;2105       i2s->I2SCTL &= ~SPI_I2SCTL_MCLKEN_Msk;
0015c6  f4214100          BIC      r1,r1,#0x8000
0015ca  6601              STR      r1,[r0,#0x60]
;;;2106   }
0015cc  4770              BX       lr
;;;2107   
                          ENDP


;*** Start embedded assembler ***

 bx lr
	ENDP

	THUMB

 bx lr
	ENDP

#line 666
|__asm___5_spi_c_SPI_Open____RRX| PROC
#line 667

 bx lr
	ENDP
